meta.title: Our Process | Prosperity Planning & Advisory
meta.description: Our structured six-step financial planning process in Woodland Hills, CA — from your complimentary clarity session through ongoing fiduciary support. See how we build your personalized plan.
meta.ogDescription: From your first clarity session to ongoing support — a structured approach to building your personalized financial plan.

hero.headline: A Clear Path to Financial Confidence
hero.subheadline: Our structured six-step process is designed to bring clarity, purpose, and confidence to every financial decision you make.

intro.heading: How We Work With You
intro.body: Financial planning shouldn't feel overwhelming. Our process is built to guide you step by step — from understanding your goals to implementing and maintaining a plan that evolves with your life. Every step is collaborative, transparent, and designed around your unique situation.

steps.title: Clarity Session
steps.subtitle: Your complimentary introductory meeting
steps.body: Everything begins with a conversation. In your Clarity Session, we get to know you — your goals, concerns, and what financial confidence looks like for you. This is a no-obligation meeting where we listen, ask thoughtful questions, and determine whether we're the right fit to help you move forward.
whatToExpect: Discussion of your financial goals and current situation
An overview of our planning process and how we work
An honest assessment of whether our services align with your needs
steps.outcome: You'll leave with a clear understanding of the next steps and what working together looks like — with no pressure or obligation.

steps.title: Document Gathering
steps.subtitle: Building your complete financial picture
steps.body: Before we can design a plan, we need to understand the full picture. We'll provide you with a clear checklist of documents and information we need to begin the planning process. Our team makes this step as simple and organized as possible.
documentsNeeded: Estate planning documents (wills, trusts, powers of attorney)
steps.outcome: With your documents in hand, we have everything we need to conduct a thorough analysis and begin building your personalized plan.

steps.title: Discovery & Analysis
steps.subtitle: Understanding your full financial landscape
steps.body: This is where the deep work begins. We analyze every aspect of your financial life — income, expenses, assets, liabilities, insurance coverage, tax situation, estate documents, and retirement projections. Our goal is to identify strengths, uncover gaps, and understand the opportunities available to you.
whatWeAnalyze: Tax efficiency across accounts and strategies
Insurance coverage gaps and risk management
Estate plan alignment with current goals
steps.outcome: A comprehensive understanding of where you stand today — the foundation for every recommendation that follows.

steps.title: Recommendations & Strategy
steps.subtitle: Your personalized financial roadmap
steps.body: Based on our analysis, we present clear, prioritized recommendations tailored to your goals, values, and timeline. We walk through each recommendation together, explain the reasoning behind it, and answer every question. Nothing moves forward until you fully understand and agree with the plan.
whatYouReceive: A written financial plan with prioritized recommendations
Investment strategy aligned with your risk tolerance and goals
Tax-efficient strategies coordinated with your CPA
A clear action plan with defined next steps
steps.outcome: You'll have a clear, documented roadmap — and the confidence to move forward knowing every recommendation is grounded in your best interest.

steps.title: Implementation
steps.subtitle: Putting your plan into action
steps.body: A plan only works if it's executed. We help you implement each recommendation with care and coordination — opening accounts, adjusting allocations, coordinating with your CPA or attorney, and ensuring every piece of the plan is properly set in motion.
whatWeHandle: Retirement plan enrollment or rollover execution
Coordination with your tax and legal professionals
steps.outcome: Your plan is fully activated — with every piece coordinated and working together toward your goals.

steps.title: Ongoing Support & Review
steps.subtitle: A plan that grows with you
steps.body: Financial planning isn't a one-time event. Life changes, markets shift, and goals evolve. We provide continuous monitoring and regular reviews to ensure your plan stays aligned with where you are — and where you want to go. You'll always have a partner in your corner.
whatsCovered: Life-event planning (marriage, home purchase, career change, inheritance)
Tax-planning coordination ahead of each tax year
Ongoing access to your financial planning portal
Direct communication with your advisor anytime
steps.outcome: A living, evolving financial plan — and an ongoing relationship built on trust, transparency, and your continued confidence.

ctaBand.heading: Ready to Start?
ctaBand.body: Your six-step journey begins with a single conversation. Schedule your complimentary Clarity Session today.
